title: tibouchina gardneri
intro: Tibouchina gardneri, also known as the purple glory bush, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Melastomataceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tibouchina gardneri include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tibouchina gardneri can be made into teas, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
